active_ingredients: Active ingredient Naproxen sodium 220mg (naproxen 200mg) (NSAID)* *nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug
indications_and_usage: Uses temporarily relieves minor aches and pains due to: minor pain of arthritis muscular aches backache menstrual cramps headache toothache the common cold temporarily reduces fever
dosage_and_administration: Directions do not take more than directed the smallest effective dose should be used drink a full glass of water with each dose Adults and children 12 years and older: take 1 caplet every 8 to 12 hours while symptoms last for the first dose you may take 2 caplets within the first hour do not exceed 2 caplets in any 8 to 12 hour period do not exceed 3 caplets in a 24 hour period Children under 12 years: ask a doctor
